title: 10 Pcs Self Adhesive Plastic Wall Hooks, Seamless Wall Hooks, Multi Function Self Adhesive Hooks, Oval Adhesive Hooks, Small Extra Sticky White Stick on Hooks for Hanging No Drilling Kitchen Bathroom
features: 【Premium Quality Material】 These oval hooks are made from high-quality plastic that is colorless, odorless, and designed for durability. They feature a super-strong adhesive bond that won’t fall off easily, providing a reliable solution for hanging your items.

【10-Piece Adhesive Hooks Set】 The package includes 10 self-adhesive hooks, offering you a perfect quantity and size to meet your daily hanging needs. Ideal for small items like keys, towels, and kitchen utensils, helping you stay organized.

【Space-Saving and Efficient】 These hooks are a great way to save space by utilizing your wall area for hanging light items. Keep your home neat and tidy while freeing up valuable counter and drawer space, perfect for small apartments or crowded spaces.

【Simple and Damage-Free Installation】 No tools or drilling required! Just clean and dry the surface, peel off the backing film, and stick the hook in place. Press firmly for one minute, wait 24 hours for the adhesive to set, and then hang your items. Works well on smooth surfaces like glass, ceramic, marble, metal, and PVC.

【Important Notice】 Each hook has a load capacity of up to 0.5 kg. Avoid hanging heavy, fragile, or expensive items. The hooks are not reusable, so do not reposition once attached. For best results, use in dry environments and allow the adhesive to set for 24 hours before use. Not suitable for drywall or surfaces that may tear.
